allow: Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "" --json --short-name "timecode-qf-timer" "Create a timer that can be hooked to a CTimecode object and emit a function at a quarter frame resolution")
Bash(python -c "from cuemsutils.tools.CTimecode import CTimecode; tc = CTimecode\(start_timecode='00:00:00:00', framerate=25\); print\(dir\(tc\)\)")

Bash(.specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh "Create a new class FadeCue as a child class of ActionCue to handle and store Fade events \(fade_in, fade_out\) to target cues. Class should have its own xml representation and be included into create_script method." --json --short-name "fade-cue" "FadeCue class")
Bash(python -c "from cuemsutils.cues.FadeCue import FadeCue, FadeCurveType; print\('import ok'\)")
Bash(python -c "from cuemsutils.tools.CTimecode import CTimecode; tc = CTimecode\('00:00:05.000'\); print\(type\(tc\)\); print\(dir\(tc\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from cuemsutils.tools.CTimecode import CTimecode; tc = CTimecode\('00:00:05.000'\); print\(tc.float\); print\(CTimecode\(\).float\)")
Bash(python -c "from cuemsutils.xml import XmlReaderWriter; print\([m for m in dir\(XmlReaderWriter\) if 'read' in m.lower\(\) or 'load' in m.lower\(\) or 'object' in m.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(python -m ruff check src/cuemsutils/cues/FadeCue.py src/cuemsutils/cues/__init__.py src/cuemsutils/cues/ActionCue.py src/cuemsutils/create_script.py tests/test_fade_cue.py)
Bash(python -m ruff check src/cuemsutils/cues/FadeCue.py src/cuemsutils/cues/__init__.py src/cuemsutils/create_script.py tests/test_fade_cue.py)
